topbar.tagline: Dealer in formal and corporate wear

footer.intro: Suitconcern is the B2B wholesaler in formal and corporate wear for retailers, menswear stores, bridal boutiques and corporate clients.

hero.label: Formal and corporate wear
hero.title:
Stylish.
Professional.
Reliable.
hero.subtitle: Suits, tuxedos and accessories for retailers and businesses. Fast delivery, competitive pricing and personal service — your reliable partner for formal and corporate wear.

warehouse.title: Wholesale specialist
warehouse.description: The trusted partner for formal and corporate wear for years.

tag.title: Extensive range
tag.description: Suits, tuxedos, jackets, waistcoats and accessories from stock.

truck.title: Fast delivery
truck.description: Never-out-of-stock core collection — ordered today, delivered fast.

ruler.title: Wide size range
ruler.description: From slim fit to extra-long sizes — the right fit for every customer.

collectionsSection.title: Our collections
collectionsSection.description: A carefully curated range for every occasion — from business to ceremony.

pakken.title: Suits
pakken.description: Business and formal suits in a broad size range.

smokings.title: Tuxedos
smokings.description: Classic and contemporary tuxedos for gala and ceremony.

colberts.title: Jackets
colberts.description: Separate jackets and blazers for a versatile look.

gilets.title: Waistcoats
gilets.description: Matching and separate waistcoats to complete any ensemble.

overhemden.title: Shirts
overhemden.description: Business and ceremony shirts in every collar and size.

accessoires.title: Accessories
accessoires.description: Ties, bow ties, pocket squares, braces and cufflinks.

bestsellers.title: Top sellers
bestsellers.description: The core collection our dealers order all year round.

about.title: A partner who thinks alongside you
about.description: We deliver more than just clothing — a considered purchasing programme tailored to what your customers ask for, backed by the assurance of stock and service.

voorraad.title: Never out of stock
voorraad.description: A fixed core collection always available from stock. Immediate replenishment, no seasonal risk and consistently the same reliable fit.

private.title: Your own brand
private.description: Bespoke garments and own labels with your branding. From label design to finishing — we produce under your name while preserving premium quality.

b2bCta.title: Ready to work together?
b2bCta.description: Request a B2B account and gain access to pricing, stock and complete ordering convenience. Approval is handled personally and promptly.

pages.collectiesHeroDescription: A carefully curated range of formal and corporate wear — always from stock, in an extensive size range.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access is reserved for approved dealers. Once signed in, prices and stock become visible in the portal.
login.fout: Incorrect login details. Please check your email and password.

login.lockLine: Prices and stock are only visible to approved accounts.
